title: Knowledge-Enhanced Generation Path
description: Build fluency in Knowledge-Enhanced Generation inside Natural Language Processing by moving from foundational terms into adjacent methods, variants, and extensions.

steps.title: Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG)
steps.summary: Retrieval Augmented Generation (RAG) belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Knowledge-Enhanced Generation. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Knowledge-Enhanced Generation. Start after Retrieval-Augmented Generation and Retrieval-Augmented Models. It opens into Naive Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG) and Modular Retrieval-Augmented Generation (RAG).
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Self-Reflective RAG
steps.summary: Self-Reflective RAG belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Knowledge-Enhanced Generation. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Knowledge-Enhanced Generation. Start after Self-RAG and RAG. It opens into Self-Reflective RAG Agent and Self-RAG (Self-Reflective RAG Agent).
steps.whyIncluded: Start here to anchor the vocabulary and core intuition for this area.

steps.title: Hierarchical RAG
steps.summary: Hierarchical RAG belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Knowledge-Enhanced Generation. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Knowledge-Enhanced Generation. Start after RAG and Hierarchical Networks. It opens into Hierarchical Memory RAG and Hierarchical RAG Agents.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Self-RAG
steps.summary: Self-RAG belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Knowledge-Enhanced Generation. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Knowledge-Enhanced Generation. Start after RAG. It opens into Self-Tuning RAG and Self-Debugging RAG.
steps.whyIncluded: Use this after the foundations to connect patterns, variants, and system behavior.

steps.title: Graph-RAG
steps.summary: Graph-RAG belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Knowledge-Enhanced Generation. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Knowledge-Enhanced Generation. Start after RAG and Graph. It opens into Graph-RAG for agents and Dynamic Knowledge Graph RAG.

steps.title: Dynamic RAG
steps.summary: Dynamic RAG belongs to the Natural Language Processing area of AI/ML, within Knowledge-Enhanced Generation. It sits inside Natural Language Processing / Knowledge-Enhanced Generation. Start after RAG and Dynamic Network Models. It opens into Dynamic Memory RAG and Dynamic Knowledge Graph RAG.
steps.whyIncluded: Treat this as an advanced extension once the earlier terms feel natural.
